bio_short: Steven Saint writes literary thrillers about long questions and patient answers. He lives in Connecticut.
bio_long: Steven Saint is the pen name of Steven P. Santovasi. He writes across literary thriller and historical fiction, with an attention to the long arc — the kind of story whose answer was the question all along. The Spiral Continuum is his first published series; he also writes the Caribbean thriller series Island of Bones. He lives in Connecticut.
